objective: Play a search result identified by a prior music.search.results handle. Preferred input is candidate_ref JSON exported from a producer step or caller; legacy source_run_id + source_artifact_id + candidate_local_id remains accepted. The underlying driver operation resolves Candidate.target_spec.row_index itself, re-checks liveness preconditions, activates the row, presses the play control, and emits a typed VerificationResult.

candidate_ref.note: Preferred CandidateRef JSON from music.search.results. Parent recipes can pass ${step_search_results_signal_music_search_results_selected_candidate_ref}.

source_run_id.note: Legacy fallback run_id of the run that produced the OperationResult candidate-set artifact. Ignored when candidate_ref is provided.

source_artifact_id.note: Legacy fallback artifact_id of the OperationResult JSON within source_run_id. Default is artifact_0003 (music.search.results always produces it at index 3). Ignored when candidate_ref is provided.

candidate_local_id.note: Legacy fallback candidate_local_id within the OperationResult to validate and play. Ignored when candidate_ref is provided.

preconditions: QQ音乐 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.
Either candidate_ref is a valid CandidateRef from music.search.results, or source_run_id and source_artifact_id point to a valid OperationResult from music.search.results.
The search result surface must still be visible (not navigated away) when this recipe runs.

notes: Liveness re-check is disturbance-free when the candidate only requires window_ref.
Row activation uses pointer disturbance through window-scoped visual-row detection.
Play press uses full-display screen OCR (click_screen_text) with a window-anchored region, which requires pointer disturbance.
The driver emits a VerificationResult with failure_layer when grounding, control, or verification fails.

mainline_exemption.reason: Controlled measurement of whether the QQ音乐 play control is reachable via AX path vs pointer fallback when activated from a contract-candidate row. Cases stay candidate per Rule 2.

expected_signals: music.result.play resolves the candidate and validates liveness.
music.result.play activates the row through window-scoped visual-row detection.
music.result.play presses the play control via full-display screen OCR (click_screen_text), converting window-relative region ratios to screen ratios.
music.result.play verifies ${target_title} through the AX now-playing contract.
success_criteria: The result row is activated through window-scoped visual-row detection.
The current now-playing title is verified through the AX tree.
non_goals: This recipe does not perform the initial search — it consumes an already-produced OperationResult.
This recipe does not select which candidate to play — that decision is made by the caller.
This recipe does not prove generalized playback for arbitrary row indices.
This recipe does not use OCR text anchors for row activation (visual-band detection is used instead).

known_limits.visual_row_index_stability: Row index is detected from the current visual state. If the result list scrolls or reorders between music.search.results and this recipe, the row_index may point to a different song.
known_limits.liveness_window_ref_only: For VisualRow candidates produced by QQ音乐, anchor_recheck is not set (window-level OCR cannot see WebView content). Liveness is checked via window_ref only (app running with visible windows).
